title: tricliceras bivinianum
intro: Tricliceras bivinianum, also known as the African or Guinea plum, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tricliceras bivinianum are attributed to its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Tricliceras bivinianum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies in various parts of Africa and Asia.
